v.1
Lesson 13 Summary Guide
Case Example: List Building with SixinSeven.com
 First started publishing information marketing content in 2003
 Included personal stories such as my “computer crash” to build
connection and affinity with my audience
 Created the AR sequence to be as evergreen as possible
(removing references to summer, holidays, world events, etc…)
 Created a squeeze page and used Aweber to track email leads
and distribute autoresponder messages.
 Started the sequence by just writing the welcome message and
first message
 Wrote the second, third, fourth and fifth messages as I went
along, staying one day ahead of the emails
 Ended up writing 9-10 autoresponder messages and then never
touched the site again
 SixinSeven.com STILL brings in 4-12 subscribers per day (120-
320 a month)
 Each subscriber is worth approximately $10 as the list is used
to promote other products
 Bottom line: Put up a squeeze page, create an autoresponder
sequence, drive traffic to it and watch the results!
